what_it_does: Records an image attachment entry in the design-source channel, linking to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-06 and capturing its addition timestamp.
observations: No body content beyond YAML front matter
standouts: Target points to a capital-raise image asset (p-06)
notes: A channel-memory image attachment stub that references a design-source capital-raise image by URI and timestamp.
questions: What is the semantic content of image p-06?
How is the target URI resolved to an actual file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an image attachment matches the file content, which only records metadata and a target URI.
intention_signals: To catalog when a specific design image was attached to the design-source channel so it can be retrieved in context later.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped pointer from a channel memory entry to an external image asset, preserving attachment provenance without embedding binary data.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory image attachment metadata file linking to image://design-source/capital-raise/p-06 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that an image asset was attached to the design-source channel at a specific time.
